  [38;5;246m(ctrl+o[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246mexpand)

[38;5;75m●[39m Read [1m1[0m file [38;5;246m(ctrl+o[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246mexpand)[39m

[38;5;239m[48;5;237m❯ [38;5;231mclean architecture, single         [39m[49m
[38;5;231m[48;5;237m  responsibility principle,          [39m[49m
[38;5;231m[48;5;237m  interface-oriented programming     [39m[49m
[38;5;231m[48;5;237m  관점에서 구조를 분석하고 어긋난    [39m[49m
[38;5;231m[48;5;237m  부분을 개선하자.                   [39m[49m

[38;5;231m●[39m 사용자의 새 요청에 따라 [1mClean[0m
  [1mArchitecture,[0m [1mSRP,[0m [1mInterface-Oriented[0m
  [1mProgramming[0m 관점에서 구조를
  분석하겠습니다.

[38;5;246m●[39m [1mExplore[0m(Analyze architecture
         principles)
  ⎿ [38;5;246mWaiting…[39md /workspace/tmp/src/main/ja
    [38;5;246mW[39m
    [38;5;246mWaiting…[39md /workspace/tmp/src/main/ja
    [38;5;246m+5[39m [38;5;246mmore[39m [38;5;246mtool[39m [38;5;246muses[39m [38;5;246m(ctrl+o[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246mexpand)[39m
     [38;5;246mctrl+b[39m [38;5;246mctrl+b[39m [38;5;246m(twice)[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246mrun[39m [38;5;246min[39m
     [38;5;246mbackground[39m

[38;5;153m─────────────────────────────────────────

   ize,shaking} -name "*.java" | xargs
